rulings.Case Title: MAIRE DWAN VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Dismiss For Fialure To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 22, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANTs SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC. and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend DENIED without prejudice. Motion to dismiss for failure to amend filed after the demurrer was sustained was filed before Notice of Entry of Order Sustaining the Demurer with Leave to Amend was served on Plaintiff. Moving papers are insufficient to support the motion. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ALZ LEE, LLC et al VS. SHACUAN SHARON LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Omnibus Motion For An Order Appointing A Referee To Ascertain The Interests Of Lienholders And Entry Of Interlocutory Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 22, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANTs GORDON LEE, SHACUAN SHARON SETO SUED HEREIN AS SHACUAN, LEE and PATRICIA W., F/K/A PATRICIA LUM MOTION's Motion And Omnibus Motion For An Order Appointing A Referee To Ascertain The Interests Of Lienholders And Entry Of Interlocutory Judgment GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for appointment of referee is GRANTED as follows: 1. Parties are to meet and confer regarding a referee and submit a joint proposed order to the Court no later than January 9, 2015. The order shall also specify the deadline for referee's report under CCP 872.630 and for any motions challenging such report; OR 2. If parties cannot agree on a referee, each party (parties shall meet and confer if submissions will be per side or per party) shall submit a list of 3 proposed referees, ready and willing to serve no later than January 9, 2015. Each party may object to one proposed referee no later than January 16, 2015. Defendant shall prepare an order appointing a referee leaving the name of the referee blank. The order shall also specify the deadline for referee's report under CCP 872.630 and for any motions challenging such report. Motion for entry of interlocutory judgment is DENIED without prejudice to be brought after the referee's report is finalized. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: WENDY HEMMING ET AL VS. YETIZEN INNOVATION LAB LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Application For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment After Hearing (Sana Choudary)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 22, 2014, line 13. PLAINTIFFs WENDY HEMMING and 55 NATOMA LLC's Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order (Sana Choudary) DENIED. Attachment is an extraordinary proceeding as to which the moving party must establish, inter alia, "the probable validity of the claim upon which an attachment may be issued." CCP §484.090. This is a complex case involving alleged breaches of several contracts in connection with a commercial lease. The motion is DENIED, as the moving papers do not make clear even how many contracts are at issue, much less state all claims or show their probable validity. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn; Mtn For Mandatory Injunction Against The Owners And Operators Of The Bristol Hotel; And Memo Of P&A Authorities Iso
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 22, 2014, line 15. PLAINTIFFs DAVID JARAMILLO, ERIC BOICE and JAMES TURNER's Motion For Mandatory Injunction Against The Owners And Operators Of The Bristol Hotel DENIED. Plaintiff failed to show that money-damages are inadequate remedy for all Plaintiffs' injuries. Additionally, no admissible evidence is provided for the Court to determine a deadline for completion of the project in its current condition. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: 363 VALENCIA STREET LLC VS. HANIEL OLIVERA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 22, 2014, line 16. PLAINTIFF 363 VALENCIA STREET LLC's Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for attorney's fees is granted in the amount of $128,616.04 as Plaintiff is the prevailing party in the action for recovery of possession of the Premises from Defendant. Request for costs is denied as untimely per CRC 3.1700. = (501/RBU)
